channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bike in the river Quaggy by wooden bridge/platform, 20th June
item.description:
Bike in the water of river Quaggy with the battery getting wet, might be contaminating in chinbrook meadows by the wooden bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadow Lane, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timber bollard displaced, 20th June
item.description:
Another timber bollard has been knocked over by a vehicle all the paving around has been broken. This keeps happening and Greenwich council refuse to give an answer as to why this stretch of road ( past a school ) is not a 20 mph zone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 x Garden Waste Wheelie Bins Abandoned, 20th June
item.description:
4 x brown Garden Waste Wheelie Bins have been abandoned at the fire exist of Salisbury Court, attracting more fly tipping inside and around them. They are in the gated area on the East side of the building. Thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture outside house, 20th June
item.description:
Dumped waste furniture left outside of house and on wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road defect/pothole, 20th June
item.description:
I noticed somewhere along this small stretch of road just after the roundabout when you get past the roadworks, there's a bit of a dip in the road that made my car jolt. Could cause wheel/suspension damage. Not sure if it's a road defect/subsidence or a pot hole, but it's caused a bump in my car both times I've gone over it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fraser Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping house hold good, 20th June
item.description:
We’ve noticed rubbish being deposited here as we have a wall to leave items on however this large deposit of rubbish was across the road and is now outside the propert wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenwood Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath leading to Hillbrow Road behind service station full of rubbish, 20th June
item.description:
The area is filthy with broken bottles and litter and has been like this for weeks. I have cleaned it up myself a couple of times but I am elderly and can't keep doing it. The little park along side the footpath is also full of rubbish. There needs to be a rubbish bin installed to encourage people not to just throw rubbish on the ground.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Bromley Hill, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped car seat + trolley, 20th June
item.description:
This has been on our street for some time and is now parked near the Children's Play Area. It looks bad but also impedes the pavement for buggies, wheelchair users and other pedestrians. Please can it be cleared. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cat hit and killed by car., 20th June
item.description:
A healthy looking cat (probably a pet) hit and killed by a car. I have moved it and reported on local social media groups to try to locate the owner.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frank Burton Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw6 6az, 20th June
item.description:
Litter & rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Dead fox, bagged to reduce the unbearable smell, 20th June
item.description:
Dead fox, bagged in a black bin bag, placed on the edge of the woodland, about 10 metres away (behind) the Leesons Way street sign, at the top of Petersham Drive, at the junction of Petersham Drive and Leesons Way. The animal has been bagged as the smell has become unbearable for residents. Please collect ASA
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3c Heath Hurst Rd, NW3 2RU, 20th June
item.description:
Light not working on lamppost
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Heath Hurst Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growth over light, 20th June
item.description:
Light is obscured by bush

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Bridge Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and broken glass, 20th June
item.description:
Been there for months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Bridge Road, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign defaced, 20th June
item.description:
Recently grafittied

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Bridge Road, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mf66hcd, 20th June
item.description:
Arrived on flatbed vehicle. Placed in free space public parking bay. Has not been attended or visited on a month. Not moved. Abandoned. MOT expires 29th June. Please contact owner to remove the vehicle and allow public to use the parking space as intended.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris on roundabout, 20th June
item.description:
This debris has been left on the roundabout at the junction of Long Lane and Pickford Lane for some time. Please remove asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green cabinet, 20th June
item.description:
Graffiti on green cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 340, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley thrown in moat by drunk teenagers., 20th June
item.description:
I was called today and noticed that around 3.30 a group of ten or so drunken teenagers had thrown a shopping trolley in the moat. The teenagers were below drinking age between 13-16. I arrived at the park and we managed to removed the M&S trolley from the moat using grappling hooks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growth at base of tree, 20th June
item.description:
This growth at the base of the tree is making it difficult to see vehicles approaching from Ruxley roundabout when exiting St. Georges Road. It is not a easy exit at any time without this extra hazard to contend with. This problem accrues every year and needs to be regular maintained before a serious event happens.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Maidstone Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
